modules.name: inventory
modules.purpose: Owns item, equipment, and inventory persistence contracts.

modules.name: farming
modules.purpose: Owns orchard plant lifecycle, growth state, harvest readiness, and farm actions.

modules.name: combat
modules.purpose: Owns future combat encounters, damage resolution, and battle-facing state.

modules.name: crafting
modules.purpose: Owns recipes, crafting validation, and item production rules.

modules.name: quests
modules.purpose: Owns quest definitions, progress tracking, rewards contracts, and quest lifecycle.

modules.name: npc
modules.purpose: Owns NPC identity, dialogue hooks, schedules, and relationship state.

modules.name: weather
modules.purpose: Owns weather types, forecasts, climate modifiers, and weather event contracts.

modules.name: economy
modules.purpose: Owns currencies, pricing rules, shop contracts, and economy telemetry.

modules.name: ui
modules.purpose: Owns gameplay-facing presentation contracts, tabs, and view model boundaries.

modules.name: world
modules.purpose: Owns orchards, locations, scene state, and world progression boundaries.
